# Failed Tasks (Post-Mortems)
Log attempts that did not meet the goal. Referenced by agents when selecting run mode (auto tends to deep if prior failure exists).

Template entry:
- Task ID:
- Date:
- Agent(s):
- Mode: shallow | deep | auto
- What happened:
- Why it failed:
- Next steps (add to `raw.tasks.md` or update `tasks.md`).
